summary: Full stack testing of the Admin dashboard + Journal CRUD MVP. Wrote pytest suite covering public endpoints, auth guards, Emergent OAuth /session error paths, and simulated-admin CRUD (create/update/delete + slug uniqueness + draft visibility). All 24 backend tests pass. UI verified via Playwright: /admin/, /admin, /admin.html, /admin/index.html all resolve to the login card with data-testid='google-login-btn'. With a seeded session cookie, /admin/ renders the full dashboard (brand 'Akash Puri · Admin', 3 seeded posts, + New Post button, editor form with every required data-testid). Portfolio '/' fetches from /api/posts and renders 3 post cards with correct titles. Regression assets (favicons, og-image, robots.txt, sitemap.xml) still 200.

endpoints_verified: GET /api/posts → 200, 3 published posts, all required fields present
POST /api/admin/posts → 200, appears in list, published post appears publicly
PUT /api/admin/posts/{id} → 200, published=false removes it from public list
Slug uniqueness: 2nd post with same slug auto-suffixed '-2'
backend.allow_list_check: server.py:149-152 enforces `role='admin' if email in ADMIN_EMAILS else HTTPException(403, 'Access restricted to site owner')`. Verified via code review — cannot mint a real Emergent session for a non-admin email in test, but the code path is confirmed.

admin_dashboard_with_seeded_cookie.loaded_post_title_example: Why Under-Pacing Is a Diagnostic Problem, Not a Bid Problem

titles: Why Under-Pacing Is a Diagnostic Problem, Not a Bid Problem
Reading a DV360 Report Like a Media Planner, Not an Ops Person
The Quiet Discipline of Floodlight Hygiene
portfolio_journal_section.fetch_source: /api/posts (dynamic, replaces old hardcoded array — verified in index.html line 1199-1207 and boot handler at 1337-1346)

frontend.regression_assets: sitemap.xml, robots.txt, favicon.ico, favicon-32/192/512.png, apple-touch-icon.png, og-image.png all 200

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: server.py stores `expires_at` as ISO string then re-parses per request (line 111). Fine for now but consider storing as native datetime for cleaner queries.

Minor: admin.html sets session_token cookie with samesite=None + secure=true + httpOnly=true (from backend). Verified admin dashboard also works via `Authorization: Bearer` header path via Mongo-seeded session (test_credentials.md flow) — dual auth path is correct.
Minor: Emergent badge inline styles on portfolio index.html are heavy but intentional (per Emergent guidelines) — no change needed.

Optional: /api/posts sort is by created_at desc; if the admin later re-publishes an older draft, its position may change. Consider sorting by an explicit `date` field or `published_at` if chronological consistency matters.
test_credentials: Followed /app/memory/test_credentials.md — seeded admin session (email=akashpuri7@gmail.com, role=admin) directly into Mongo via pytest fixture with cleanup. Session tokens prefixed with 'test_session_'.
seed_data_creation: Pytest fixtures create/cleanup admin users + sessions with 'test_session_' prefix. Test posts prefixed with 'test-' and deleted after run. Post-run mongo state: users=0, user_sessions=0, posts=3 (original seed intact).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py uses pytest-xdist (2 workers, ~3s). Reads BASE_URL from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL and MONGO_URL/DB_NAME from env. Admin auth is simulated via mongo-seeded user+session (see admin_session fixture) and Authorization: Bearer header — matching /app/memory/test_credentials.md. For UI tests, inject session_token cookie with domain=<preview-host>, path=/, secure=True, sameSite='None' before navigating to /admin/. Use wait_until='domcontentloaded' + wait_for_selector rather than 'networkidle' — the page keeps a long-lived font connection that never fully idles. Playwright's httpOnly attribute doesn't matter for server-side reading; server reads request.cookies regardless.
